words.def: distinguished from Bovidae by the male's having solid deciduous antlers
tall woody perennial grasses with hollow slender stems especially of the genera Arundo and Phragmites
words.zh: n. 蘆葦, 蘆笛, 簧舌, 纖弱的人

words.def: red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood
words.zh: a. 紅的, 紅色的, 紅腫的, 流血的
